userText: In a way, if your grammar skill is good, and you can say the full sentence easier
correctedText: In a way, if your grammar is solid, you can say full sentences more easily.
generalAdvice: 你已经抓住了 in a way 的意思，也会把它放在句首。下一步重点是后半句的自然搭配和比较级表达。

issues.note: grammar skill is good 不够自然，这里更自然的是 your grammar is solid 或 your grammar is good。
issues.suggestion: 谈英语能力时，优先用 your grammar is solid / good，少用 grammar skill。

issues.note: if 从句后面不需要再用 and 直接硬接完整分句。
say the full sentence easier 不自然，更自然的是 say full sentences more easily。
issues.suggestion: 表达“更容易地说完整句子”时，优先用 say full sentences more easily。
